TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Romi'adan no cikiw i hekal (ikilis: Earth Day) pasetek to mihecahecaan 4 folad 22 romi'ad, o kalonohekalan to pidipot to pala a demak. Sa'ayaway demak romi'ad no cikiw i 1970 miheca i Amilika a pitilidan mapalowad kina pidipot to pala a onto, 1990 miheca onini a demak nai Amilika pasayra i hekal, malakapolongan no midipotay to pala no hekal a romi'adan ato pisintingan pidipot to pala a romi'ad, toni a romi'ad kasasiromaroma no kitakit a tamdaw kasasiroma a pisinting ato sapilaheciaw to pidipot to pala a nihiratengan. Nipitekaan ato pitomadawan иµЈжЇРиИЗзЩЉе±Х Sarakatay a romi'ad no cikiw misimsim itiya i pisatapangan no kacanglahan, onini a romi'ad o kasofocan no cikiw, itiya mapatedi no likat ko Notimolan 'Apocok ato No'amisan 'Apocok, tatodong a kalalenan no hekal, nanoya pahapinang to tamdamdaw wa'ecikaw ho ko kalaliyaliyangan ato caay kalecad, masasinga'ay ma'orip. Noto'asan adihay ko kitakit malipahak i pisatapangan no kacanglahan mipafilong. 'Ayaway no Linhoko itira i satapangan no canglahan pasaopo to romi'ad no cikiw demak. 1969 miheca fafa'eday pikaikian Mincotang Kaylote Nilson no Amilika i kakoTaykako no Amilika mipapelo, milingato i roma miheca saka 4 folad 22 romi'ad mipasaopo miliyang to kalalood i Yinan ko patosokan pitilidan a onto, nakawrira i 1969 miheca i Siato pasaopo lomaoc, mikihatiyaay tina saopo a tamdaw, o sito no Hafo Taykako ci Tanis Hais paini tonini a onto kao kapolongan no Amilika, o sapidipot to pala ko patosokan ninaonto saan. 1970 miheca saka 4 folad 22 romi'ad i kasaniyaro' no Amilika mata'elif ko 2000 'ofad no tamdaw ko mikihatiyaay to ni a sapidipot to pala a onto, itini to na onto malaheci i mihecahecaan to saka 4 folad 22 romi'ad o sapidipot to pala a mileko, i Amilika a romi'ad no cikiw sanay a ngangan midotoc i pisatapangan no kacanglahan malalinah tayra to i saka 4 folad 22 romi'ad, romi'ad no cikiw patosok i sapidipot to pala a onto. Aniniay tamdaw kai 1970 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad nai Amilika saka 1 liyad to romi'ad no cikiw a demak o sarakatay no hekal masaopo no 'alomanay to sakipidipot to pala a onto, toni a onto malengat ko tamdaw to sakianiniay sapitomadaw midipot to pala, palowad to macakatay kitakit to sapidipot to pala patireng to rikec, orasaka mapalowad i 1972 miheca Linhoko saka cecay natamdawan a pala kalomaoc. Itiya 1970 miheca a demak pasakapotay ci Tanis Hais mapangangan no tamdaw o romi'ad no cikiw a mama ahan. Nawhani mapalowad i salaloma'an no hekal ko pidipot to pala a onto, 1990 miheca saka 20 liyad romi'ad no cikiw a citodongay to nidemak a pasakapotay nanay mapalowaday i laloma' no Amilika pasipapotal macowat i hekal, itiya cangra patilid to Cungko, Amilika, inkilis toloay a kakeridan tamdaw ato Linhoko a Mipadangay to kakomodan, paini cangraan to dademaken, kasasiket to pakayniay to pidipot to pala a kasasitatelak, masasidama to sakacaaw kalatiih ko palapala; itiya o romi'ad no cikiw a pasakapotay paini to i hekalay mihayda misa'icel palowad to midipotay to pala a sifo i 1990 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad makerih to finawlan to midipotay to pala a onto. Midipotay to pala a demak palowaday malayapto no Asiya karopaw, Afelika karopaw, Amilika karopaw, Yolop karopaw adihayay kitakit ato kalokitakit a cefang mikihatiya, ikor i 1990 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad polong no hekal to 140 kitakit mata'elifay ko 2 Yoko ko tamdaw to mikihatiyaay tini demak. Nai romi'adan no cikiw i hekal malakapolongan no hekal to midipotay to pala a onto. Fayafay no cikiw еЬ∞зРГдєЛжЧЧ Fayafay no cikiw a tilid o Apolo 17 haw nisyasingan "Langdaway a odo'" a saying mateli i talolongay langdaway ko faku, o nai ni Yohani Maykenil i 1969 miheca sarakatay liyad a romi'adan no cikiw i hekal a demak nisafacoan, anini onini a fayafay o no midipotay to pala onto a salong. Romi'adan no cikiw a pinangan еЬ∞зРГжЧ•ж®Щи™М Romi'adan no cikiw a pinangan o fohecalay ko faku a kangdaway no Koris a tilid ќШ: ќШ Kining зіАењµ 2016 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad, i Google a saka cecay felih ira ko lima masasiromaay pinangan, pihiratengan to romi'adan no cikiw. 2020 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad, i Google a saka cecay felih no 'odal kasasilamo a salama, pihiratengan to romi'adan no cikiw to 50 mihecaan.. pikafitan tahapinangan зЫЄйЧЬйА£зµР 1.Fayafay no Linhoko. 2.Fayafay no lamal.

…ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak. sa °ajawaj …ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw i **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a i ami…Њika a piti…Њi…ђ~…Ѓan mapa…Њo~uwa…ђ~…Ѓ kina pi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a o~unto~u, **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a o~unini a …ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak nai ami…Њika pasajra i ƒІ…Щka…Њ, ma…Њakapo~u…Њo~u≈Лan no~u mi…ђ~…Ѓipo~utaj to~u pa…Њa no~u ƒІ…Щka…Њ a ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓan ato~u pisinti≈Лan pi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ, to~uni a ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ kasasiro~umaro~uma no~u kitakit a tam…ђ~…Ѓaw kasasiro~uma a pisinti≈Л ato~u sapi…ЊaƒІ…Щ ¶iaw to~u pi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a niƒІirat…Щ≈Лan. nipit…Щkaan ato~u pito~uma…ђ~…Ѓawan ***** sarakataj a ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw misimsim itija i pisatapa≈Лan no~u ka ¶a≈Л…ЊaƒІan, o~unini a ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ o~u kaso~ufo~u ¶an no~u ¶ikiw, itija mapat…Щ…ђ~…Ѓi no~u …Њikat ko~u no~utimo~u…Њan °apo~u ¶o~uk ato~u no~u °amisan °apo~u ¶o~uk, tato~u…ђ~…Ѓo~u≈Л a ka…Њa…Њ…Щnan no~u ƒІ…Щka…Њ, nano~uja paƒІapina≈Л to~u tam…ђ~…Ѓam…ђ~…Ѓaw wa °…Щ ¶ikaw ƒІo~u ko~u ka…Њa…Њija…Њija≈Лan ato~u ¶aaj ka…Њ…Щ ¶a…ђ~…Ѓ, masasi≈Лa °aj ma °o~urip. no~uto~u °asan a…ђ~…ЃiƒІaj ko~u kitakit ma…ЊipaƒІak i pisatapa≈Лan no~u ka ¶a≈Л…ЊaƒІan mipafi…Њo~u≈Л. °ajawaj no~u …ЊinƒІo~uko~u itira i satapa≈Лan no~u ¶a≈Л…ЊaƒІan pasao~upo~u to~u ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw …ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak. **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a fafa °…Щ…ђ~…Ѓaj pikaikian min ¶o~uta≈Л kaj…Њo~ut…Щ ni…Њso~un no~u ami…Њika i kako~utajkako~u no~u ami…Њika mipap…Щ…Њo~u, mi…Њi≈Лato~u i ro~uma miƒІ…Щ ¶a saka * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ mipasao~upo~u mi…Њija≈Л to~u ka…Њa…Њo~uo~u…ђ~…Ѓ i jinan ko~u pato~uso~ukan piti…Њi…ђ~…Ѓan a o~unto~u, nakawrira i **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a i siato~u pasao~upo~u …Њo~umao~u ¶, mikiƒІatijaaj tina sao~upo~u a tam…ђ~…Ѓaw, o~u sito~u no~u ƒІafo~u tajkako~u ¶i tanis ƒІais paini to~unini a o~unto~u kao~u kapo~u…Њo~u≈Лan no~u ami…Њika, o~u sapi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa ko~u pato~uso~ukan ninao~unto~u saan. **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a saka * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ i kasanijaro~u ° no~u ami…Њika mata °…Щ…Њif ko~u **** °o~ufa…ђ~…Ѓ no~u tam…ђ~…Ѓaw ko~u mikiƒІatijaaj to~u ni a sapi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a o~unto~u, itini to~u na o~unto~u ma…ЊaƒІ…Щ ¶i i miƒІ…Щ ¶aƒІ…Щ ¶aan to~u saka * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ o~u sapi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a mi…Њ…Щko~u, i ami…Њika a ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw sanaj a ≈Лa≈Лan mi…ђ~…Ѓo~uto~u ¶ i pisatapa≈Лan no~u ka ¶a≈Л…ЊaƒІan ma…Њa…ЊinaƒІ tajra to~u i saka * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ, ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw pato~uso~uk i sapi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a o~unto~u. aniniaj tam…ђ~…Ѓaw kai **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ nai ami…Њika saka * …Њija…ђ~…Ѓ to~u ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw a …ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak o~u sarakataj no~u ƒІ…Щka…Њ masao~upo~u no~u °a…Њo~umanaj to~u sakipi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a o~unto~u, to~uni a o~unto~u ma…Њ…Щ≈Лat ko~u tam…ђ~…Ѓaw to~u sakianiniaj sapito~uma…ђ~…Ѓaw mi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa, pa…Њo~uwa…ђ~…Ѓ to~u ma ¶akataj kitakit to~u sapi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa patir…Щ≈Л to~u rik…Щ ¶, o~urasaka mapa…Њo~uwa…ђ~…Ѓ i **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a …ЊinƒІo~uko~u saka ¶…Щ ¶aj natam…ђ~…Ѓawan a pa…Њa ka…Њo~umao~u ¶. itija **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a a …ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak pasakapo~utaj ¶i tanis ƒІais mapa≈Лa≈Лan no~u tam…ђ~…Ѓaw o~u ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw a mama aƒІan. nawƒІani mapa…Њo~uwa…ђ~…Ѓ i sa…Њa…Њo~uma °an no~u ƒІ…Щka…Њ ko~u pi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a o~unto~u, **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a saka ** …Њija…ђ~…Ѓ ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw a ¶ito~u…ђ~…Ѓo~u≈Лaj to~u ni…ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak a pasakapo~utaj nanaj mapa…Њo~uwa…ђ~…Ѓaj i …Њa…Њo~uma ° no~u ami…Њika pasipapo~uta…Њ ma ¶o~uwat i ƒІ…Щka…Њ, itija ¶a≈Лra pati…Њi…ђ~…Ѓ to~u ¶o~u~u≈Лko~u, ami…Њika, inki…Њis to~u…Њo~uaj a kak…Щri…ђ~…Ѓan tam…ђ~…Ѓaw ato~u …ЊinƒІo~uko~u a mipa…ђ~…Ѓa≈Лaj to~u kako~umo~u…ђ~…Ѓan, paini ¶a≈Лraan to~u …ђ~…Ѓa…ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak…Щn, kasasik…Щt to~u pakajniaj to~u pi…ђ~…Ѓipo~ut to~u pa…Њa a kasasitat…Щ…Њak, masasi…ђ~…Ѓama to~u saka ¶aaw ka…ЊatiiƒІ ko~u pa…Њapa…Њa; itija o~u ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ no~u ¶ikiw a pasakapo~utaj paini to~u i ƒІ…Щka…Њaj miƒІaj…ђ~…Ѓa misa °i ¶…Щ…Њ pa…Њo~uwa…ђ~…Ѓ to~u mi…ђ~…Ѓipo~utaj to~u pa…Њa a sifo~u i **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ mak…ЩriƒІ to~u finaw…Њan to~u mi…ђ~…Ѓipo~utaj to~u pa…Њa a o~unto~u. mi…ђ~…Ѓipo~utaj to~u pa…Њa a …ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak pa…Њo~uwa…ђ~…Ѓaj ma…Њajapto~u no~u asija karo~upaw, af…Щ…Њika karo~upaw, ami…Њika karo~upaw, jo~u…Њo~up karo~upaw a…ђ~…ЃiƒІajaj kitakit ato~u ka…Њo~ukitakit a ¶…Щfa≈Л mikiƒІatija, iko~ur i **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ po~u…Њo~u≈Л no~u ƒІ…Щka…Њ to~u *** kitakit mata °…Щ…Њifaj ko~u * jo~uko~u ko~u tam…ђ~…Ѓaw to~u mikiƒІatijaaj tini …ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak. nai ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓan no~u ¶ikiw i ƒІ…Щka…Њ ma…Њakapo~u…Њo~u≈Лan no~u ƒІ…Щka…Њ to~u mi…ђ~…Ѓipo~utaj to~u pa…Њa a o~unto~u. fajafaj no~u ¶ikiw **** fajafaj no~u ¶ikiw a ti…Њi…ђ~…Ѓ o~u apo~u…Њo~u ** ƒІaw nisjasi≈Лan "…Њa≈Л…ђ~…Ѓawaj a o~u…ђ~…Ѓo~u °" a saji≈Л mat…Щ…Њi i ta…Њo~u…Њo~u≈Лaj …Њa≈Л…ђ~…Ѓawaj ko~u fako~u~u, o~u nai ni jo~uƒІani majk…Щni…Њ i **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a sarakataj …Њija…ђ~…Ѓ a ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓan no~u ¶ikiw i ƒІ…Щka…Њ a …ђ~…Ѓ…Щmak nisafa ¶o~uan, anini o~unini a fajafaj o~u no~u mi…ђ~…Ѓipo~utaj to~u pa…Њa o~unto~u a sa…Њo~u≈Л. ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓan no~u ¶ikiw a pina≈Лan ***** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓan no~u ¶ikiw a pina≈Лan o~u fo~uƒІ…Щ ¶a…Њaj ko~u fako~u~u a ka≈Л…ђ~…Ѓawaj no~u ko~uris a ti…Њi…ђ~…Ѓ *: * kini≈Л ** **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ, i *o~uo~u*…Њ…Щ a saka ¶…Щ ¶aj f…Щ…ЊiƒІ ira ko~u …Њima masasiro~umaaj pina≈Лan, piƒІirat…Щ≈Лan to~u ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓan no~u ¶ikiw. **** miƒІ…Щ ¶a * fo~u…Њa…ђ~…Ѓ ** ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓ, i *o~uo~u*…Њ…Щ a saka ¶…Щ ¶aj f…Щ…ЊiƒІ no~u °o~u…ђ~…Ѓa…Њ kasasi…Њamo~u a sa…Њama, piƒІirat…Щ≈Лan to~u ro~umi °a…ђ~…Ѓan no~u ¶ikiw to~u ** miƒІ…Щ ¶aan.. pikafitan taƒІapina≈Лan **** *.fajafaj no~u …ЊinƒІo~uko~u. *.fajafaj no~u …Њama…Њ.
S.FORM: Romi'adan no cikiw i hekal (ikilis: Earth Day) pasetek to mihecahecaan 4 folad 22 romi'ad, o kalonohekalan to pidipot to pala a demak. Sa'ayaway demak romi'ad no cikiw i 1970 miheca i Amilika a pitilidan mapalowad kina pidipot to pala a onto, 1990 miheca onini a demak nai Amilika pasayra i hekal, malakapolongan no midipotay to pala no hekal a romi'adan ato pisintingan pidipot to pala a romi'ad, toni a romi'ad kasasiromaroma no kitakit a tamdaw kasasiroma a pisinting ato sapilaheciaw to pidipot to pala a nihiratengan. Nipitekaan ato pitomadawan иµЈжЇРиИЗзЩЉе±Х Sarakatay a romi'ad no cikiw misimsim itiya i pisatapangan no kacanglahan, onini a romi'ad o kasofocan no cikiw, itiya mapatedi no likat ko Notimolan 'Apocok ato No'amisan 'Apocok, tatodong a kalalenan no hekal, nanoya pahapinang to tamdamdaw wa'ecikaw ho ko kalaliyaliyangan ato caay kalecad, masasinga'ay ma'orip. Noto'asan adihay ko kitakit malipahak i pisatapangan no kacanglahan mipafilong. 'Ayaway no Linhoko itira i satapangan no canglahan pasaopo to romi'ad no cikiw demak. 1969 miheca fafa'eday pikaikian Mincotang Kaylote Nilson no Amilika i kakoTaykako no Amilika mipapelo, milingato i roma miheca saka 4 folad 22 romi'ad mipasaopo miliyang to kalalood i Yinan ko patosokan pitilidan a onto, nakawrira i 1969 miheca i Siato pasaopo lomaoc, mikihatiyaay tina saopo a tamdaw, o sito no Hafo Taykako ci Tanis Hais paini tonini a onto kao kapolongan no Amilika, o sapidipot to pala ko patosokan ninaonto saan. 1970 miheca saka 4 folad 22 romi'ad i kasaniyaro' no Amilika mata'elif ko 2000 'ofad no tamdaw ko mikihatiyaay to ni a sapidipot to pala a onto, itini to na onto malaheci i mihecahecaan to saka 4 folad 22 romi'ad o sapidipot to pala a mileko, i Amilika a romi'ad no cikiw sanay a ngangan midotoc i pisatapangan no kacanglahan malalinah tayra to i saka 4 folad 22 romi'ad, romi'ad no cikiw patosok i sapidipot to pala a onto. Aniniay tamdaw kai 1970 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad nai Amilika saka 1 liyad to romi'ad no cikiw a demak o sarakatay no hekal masaopo no 'alomanay to sakipidipot to pala a onto, toni a onto malengat ko tamdaw to sakianiniay sapitomadaw midipot to pala, palowad to macakatay kitakit to sapidipot to pala patireng to rikec, orasaka mapalowad i 1972 miheca Linhoko saka cecay natamdawan a pala kalomaoc. Itiya 1970 miheca a demak pasakapotay ci Tanis Hais mapangangan no tamdaw o romi'ad no cikiw a mama ahan. Nawhani mapalowad i salaloma'an no hekal ko pidipot to pala a onto, 1990 miheca saka 20 liyad romi'ad no cikiw a citodongay to nidemak a pasakapotay nanay mapalowaday i laloma' no Amilika pasipapotal macowat i hekal, itiya cangra patilid to Cungko, Amilika, inkilis toloay a kakeridan tamdaw ato Linhoko a Mipadangay to kakomodan, paini cangraan to dademaken, kasasiket to pakayniay to pidipot to pala a kasasitatelak, masasidama to sakacaaw kalatiih ko palapala; itiya o romi'ad no cikiw a pasakapotay paini to i hekalay mihayda misa'icel palowad to midipotay to pala a sifo i 1990 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad makerih to finawlan to midipotay to pala a onto. Midipotay to pala a demak palowaday malayapto no Asiya karopaw, Afelika karopaw, Amilika karopaw, Yolop karopaw adihayay kitakit ato kalokitakit a cefang mikihatiya, ikor i 1990 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad polong no hekal to 140 kitakit mata'elifay ko 2 Yoko ko tamdaw to mikihatiyaay tini demak. Nai romi'adan no cikiw i hekal malakapolongan no hekal to midipotay to pala a onto. Fayafay no cikiw еЬ∞зРГдєЛжЧЧ Fayafay no cikiw a tilid o Apolo 17 haw nisyasingan "Langdaway a odo'" a saying mateli i talolongay langdaway ko faku, o nai ni Yohani Maykenil i 1969 miheca sarakatay liyad a romi'adan no cikiw i hekal a demak nisafacoan, anini onini a fayafay o no midipotay to pala onto a salong. Romi'adan no cikiw a pinangan еЬ∞зРГжЧ•ж®Щи™М Romi'adan no cikiw a pinangan o fohecalay ko faku a kangdaway no Koris a tilid ќШ: ќШ Kining зіАењµ 2016 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad, i Google a saka cecay felih ira ko lima masasiromaay pinangan, pihiratengan to romi'adan no cikiw. 2020 miheca 4 folad 22 romi'ad, i Google a saka cecay felih no 'odal kasasilamo a salama, pihiratengan to romi'adan no cikiw to 50 mihecaan.. pikafitan tahapinangan зЫЄйЧЬйА£зµР 1.Fayafay no Linhoko. 2.Fayafay no lamal.
